mapper.sql: id, user_id, session_id, user_type, satisfaction_score, preferred_products, purchase_frequency, total_spending, service_times, last_purchase_time, last_service_time, tags, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, session_id, user_type, satisfaction_score, preferred_products, purchase_frequency, total_spending, service_times, last_purchase_time, last_service_time, tags, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{userType}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{preferredProducts}, #{purchaseFrequency}, #{totalSpending}, #{serviceTimes}, #{lastPurchaseTime}, #{lastServiceTime}, #{tags}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM user_profiles WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM user_profiles
( UPPER(user_type) = 'MEMBER' OR ( user_id IS NOT NULL AND ( COALESCE(total_spending, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(purchase_frequency, 0) > 0 ) ) )
( UPPER(user_type) = 'REGISTERED' OR ( user_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(total_spending, 0) <= 0 AND COALESCE(purchase_frequency, 0) <= 0 AND COALESCE(UPPER(user_type), '') <> 'MEMBER' ) )
UPPER(user_type) = UPPER(#{userType})
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND last_service_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
